General.Name: Asian Battery Metals Plc
General.Description: Asian Battery Metals PLC engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral properties in Mongolia and Altai. It explores for graphite, nickel, copper, lithium, and platinum group element deposits. The company holds 100% interests in the Yambat Oval Ni-Cu-PGE project that consists of one tenement located in the Yambat, Yesonbulag and Taishir sub provinces, Gobi-Altai Province; the Khukh Tag graphite project, which consists of one tenement situated in the Khukh Tag, Undurshil sub-province, Dundgovi province; and the Tsagaan Ders lithium project that consists of two tenements located in the Tsagaan Ders, Khuld sub-province, Dundgovi province. The company was formerly known as Doriemus PLC and changed its name to Asian Battery Metals PLC in June 2024. Asian Battery Metals PLC was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Perth, Australia.
